title: Pritchardia remota
taxonomy: Pritchardia remota is classified as a species of palm tree. It belongs to the genus Pritchardia, which is a group of palm trees native to the Pacific Islands. The genus Pritchardia is part of the family Arecaceae, which includes over 2,600 species of palms. Pritchardia remota is specifically native to the island of Niue in the Pacific Ocean. It is considered an endangered species due to habitat loss and other environmental factors.
